allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: obj = json.loads\(line\) if obj.get\(''role''\) == ''user'': for part in obj.get\(''content'', []\): if isinstance\(part, dict\) and part.get\(''type''\) == ''text'': text = part[''text''] if len\(text\) > 500: print\(f''USER MESSAGE \(len={len\(text\)}\): {text[:200]}...''\) else: print\(f''USER MESSAGE: {text}''\) ")
